title: Timber procurement: checklists for submitting category B evidence
body: "You should use the Category B checklists to demonstrate evidence of compliance under the Timber Procurement Policy.  There are two checklists available to use:   checklist 1 – supply chain information checklist 2 – forest source information for sustainability   Checklist 1 should be used to confirm which forest or forests the product originates from.  Checklist 2 should be used to confirm the forest or forests of harvest meets sustainable criteria. "
